description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and mature landscaping including several large trees and shrubs. The front facade features a central walkway leading to a main entrance, flanked by windows and a small garden bed. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a spacious backyard with a red octagonal above-ground pool, a patio area, and a set of outdoor lounge chairs. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of stone and light-colored siding, with a flat or low-pitched roof and multiple skylights. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically around the structure, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a driveway and a small outbuilding or shed adjacent to the main house.
description: A single-story bungalow with stone and light siding, surrounded by a fenced yard, mature trees, and a backyard pool. Features include large windows, a central entrance, and a spacious outdoor area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, walkway, garden beds, and two large trees flanking the path.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone wall, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red octagonal pool, patio, outdoor lounge chairs, and multiple large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the fenced yard, additional trees, and the side entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
